---
pagetitle: "Thinh Ong"
description: "Thinh Ong is a medical doctor and infectious disease modeller at the University of Oxford, building mathematical models that turn outbreak data into evidence and decisions."
image: profile.png
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
anchor-sections: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Citation indices (shared with the research page through the same 24h cache)
# and the package count (written by the software page) so the homepage numbers
# stay consistent and auto-update, with safe fallbacks if a source is missing.
sch <- tryCatch({ source("code/scholar.R"); get_scholar_indices(cache = "research/.scholar-cache.json") },
                error = function(e) list(citations = 313L, hindex = 8L))
npkg <- tryCatch(as.integer(readLines("code/.pkg-count", n = 1)), error = function(e) NA_integer_)
if (length(npkg) != 1 || is.na(npkg) || npkg <= 0) npkg <- 6L
cat(sprintf('<script>window.SCHOLAR={citations:%d,hindex:%d};window.PKGCOUNT=%d;</script>',
            as.integer(sch$citations), as.integer(sch$hindex), as.integer(npkg)))
```

```{=html}
<section class="home-hero">
  <div class="folio-hero">
    <span class="fh-glow" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <div class="fh-side fh-left">
      <p class="fh-name">THINH ONG <span class="fh-dot"></span></p>
      <div class="fh-word"><span class="fw-thin">MEDICAL</span><span class="fw-fill">DOCTOR</span></div>
    </div>
    <figure class="fh-photo">
      <img src="profile.png" alt="Thinh Ong">
      <span class="fh-hi">Hi</span>
    </figure>
    <div class="fh-side fh-right">
      <div class="fh-word"><span class="fw-thin">MATHEMATICAL</span><span class="fw-fill">MODELLER</span></div>
      <div class="fh-below">
        <p class="fh-tag">A medical doctor and PhD in infectious disease modelling trained at the University of Oxford.</p>
        <div class="fh-links">
          <a href="about/cv.pdf"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> View my CV</a>
          <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PkfvVs0AAAAJ"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Scholar</a>
          <a href="mailto:ongphucthinh@gmail.com"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-affil reveal r5">
    <span class="affil-cap">Affiliations</span>
    <div class="logo-marquee">
      <div class="lm-track">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oxford.jpg" alt="University of Oxford">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oucru.png" alt="Oxford University Clinical Research Unit">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midsea.svg" alt="MIDSEA">
        <img src="img/affiliations/mah.png" alt="Measles Analytics Hub">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midvie.svg" alt="Modelling Infectious Diseases in Vietnam">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oxford.jpg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oucru.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midsea.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/mah.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midvie.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oxford.jpg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oucru.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midsea.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/mah.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midvie.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oxford.jpg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/oucru.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midsea.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/mah.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <img src="img/affiliations/midvie.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <a class="scroll-cue" href="#work" aria-label="Scroll to selected work">
    <span class="scroll-cue-label">Selected work</span>
    <span class="scroll-cue-icon"><i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i></span>
  </a>
</section>

<section class="section-work" id="work">
  <h2 class="sec-title on-scroll"><span class="sec-dot"></span>Selected work</h2>
  <svg width="0" height="0" style="position:absolute" aria-hidden="true"><defs><linearGradient id="fg" x1="0" y1="1" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#5fa6c6"></stop><stop offset=".5" stop-color="#7d92d6"></stop><stop offset="1" stop-color="#e0896a"></stop></linearGradient></defs></svg>
  <div class="bento">
    <div class="tile t-stats">
      <span class="tk"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i> Research impact</span>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <div class="stat"><b class="ct" data-key="citations" data-fallback="313">0</b><span>Citations</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><b class="ct" data-key="hindex" data-fallback="8">0</b><span>h-index</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><b class="ct" data-key="packages" data-fallback="6">0</b><span>R packages</span></div>
      </div>
      <p class="stat-foot">A <b>medical doctor</b> and <b>infectious disease modeller</b>, turning routine data into outbreak decisions.</p>
    </div>

    <a class="tile t-feature" href="https://doi.org/10.3201/eid3110.250234" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="tk"><i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i> First author &middot; Emerg Infect Dis 2025</span>
      <h3 class="tname">A measles immunity gap, caught before the outbreak</h3>
      <p class="tdesc">Integrating routine data to quantify population immunity and flag rising outbreak risk early.</p>
      <span class="tgo">Read the paper <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
      <svg class="feat-art" viewBox="0 0 240 150" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6,140 C50,134 70,120 96,64 C112,30 124,14 150,14 C178,14 196,96 210,118 L234,118" stroke="url(#fg)"></path></svg>
    </a>

    <a class="tile t-denim" href="https://thinhong.github.io/denim" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="ti"><i class="bi bi-box"></i></span>
      <span class="tk">Open source</span>
      <h3 class="tname">denim, a compartmental modelling engine</h3>
      <p class="tdesc">First-author R package for fast epidemic simulation.</p>
      <span class="tgo">Explore the package <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
    </a>

    <a class="tile t-hcdc" href="research/index.qmd">
      <span class="ti"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></span>
      <span class="tk">Real-world impact</span>
      <h3 class="tname">Ho Chi Minh City CDC</h3>
      <p class="tdesc">Training their in-house team to model outbreaks.</p>
      <span class="tgo">How I advise <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
    </a>

    <a class="tile t-nav c1" href="research/index.qmd">
      <span class="ti"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i></span>
      <span class="tname">Research</span>
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-right arr"></i>
    </a>
    <a class="tile t-nav c2" href="teaching/index.qmd">
      <span class="ti"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i></span>
      <span class="tname">Teaching</span>
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-right arr"></i>
    </a>
    <a class="tile t-nav wide c3" href="software/index.qmd">
      <span class="ti"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i></span>
      <span class="tname">Software &middot; <span class="pkgn">6</span> open-source packages</span>
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-right arr"></i>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
(function(){
  var reduce = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
  var els = document.querySelectorAll('.on-scroll');
  if (!reduce && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
      entries.forEach(function (en) {
        if (en.isIntersecting) { en.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(en.target); }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.16, rootMargin: '0px 0px -8% 0px' });
    els.forEach(function (el) { io.observe(el); });
  } else {
    els.forEach(function (el) { el.classList.add('in'); });
  }

  // pointer type (also used by the hero parallax below)
  var fine = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(pointer:fine)').matches;

  // Selected work bento: staggered reveal + count-up
  var tiles = [].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.section-work .tile'));
  if (!reduce && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    var tio = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
      entries.forEach(function (en) {
        if (en.isIntersecting) {
          var el = en.target;
          el.classList.add('in');
          el.addEventListener('transitionend', function clr(e) { if (e.propertyName === 'opacity') { el.style.transitionDelay = '0s'; el.removeEventListener('transitionend', clr); } });
          tio.unobserve(el);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.18 });
    tiles.forEach(function (el, i) { el.style.transitionDelay = (i * 0.06) + 's'; tio.observe(el); });
  } else {
    tiles.forEach(function (el) { el.classList.add('in'); });
  }
  function workTarget(el) {
    var S = window.SCHOLAR || {}, k = el.getAttribute('data-key');
    if (k === 'citations' && S.citations) return +S.citations;
    if (k === 'hindex' && S.hindex) return +S.hindex;
    if (k === 'packages' && window.PKGCOUNT) return +window.PKGCOUNT;
    return parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-fallback'), 10) || 0;
  }
  function workCount(el) { var to = workTarget(el); if (reduce) { el.textContent = to; return; } var n = 0, step = Math.max(1, Math.round(to / 26)); var t = setInterval(function () { n += step; if (n >= to) { n = to; clearInterval(t); } el.textContent = n; }, 38); }
  var pkgn = document.querySelector('.section-work .pkgn');
  if (pkgn && window.PKGCOUNT) pkgn.textContent = window.PKGCOUNT;
  var cts = [].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.section-work .ct'));
  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    var cio = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
      entries.forEach(function (en) { if (en.isIntersecting) { workCount(en.target); cio.unobserve(en.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.6 });
    cts.forEach(function (el) { cio.observe(el); });
  } else { cts.forEach(workCount); }

  // Hero: choreographed entrance + cursor-depth parallax
  var hero = document.querySelector('.folio-hero');
  if (hero) {
    requestAnimationFrame(function () { hero.classList.add('play'); });
    if (fine && !reduce) {
      var ph = hero.querySelector('.fh-photo'),
          hi = hero.querySelector('.fh-hi'),
          nm = hero.querySelector('.fh-name'),
          gl = hero.querySelector('.fh-glow'),
          lw = hero.querySelector('.fh-left .fh-word'),
          rw = hero.querySelector('.fh-right .fh-word');
      var tx = 0, ty = 0, cx = 0, cy = 0, raf = 0;
      function loop() {
        cx += (tx - cx) * 0.07; cy += (ty - cy) * 0.07;
        if (ph) ph.style.transform = 'perspective(1000px) rotateY(' + (cx * 9).toFixed(2) + 'deg) rotateX(' + (-cy * 9).toFixed(2) + 'deg) translate(' + (cx * 16).toFixed(1) + 'px,' + (cy * 16).toFixed(1) + 'px)';
        if (lw) lw.style.transform = 'translate(' + (-cx * 30).toFixed(1) + 'px,' + (-cy * 14).toFixed(1) + 'px)';
        if (rw) rw.style.transform = 'translate(' + (cx * 30).toFixed(1) + 'px,' + (cy * 14).toFixed(1) + 'px)';
        if (hi) hi.style.transform = 'translate(' + (cx * 46).toFixed(1) + 'px,' + (cy * 34).toFixed(1) + 'px)';
        if (nm) nm.style.transform = 'translate(' + (-cx * 16).toFixed(1) + 'px,' + (-cy * 8).toFixed(1) + 'px)';
        if (gl) gl.style.transform = 'translate(calc(-50% + ' + (cx * 70).toFixed(1) + 'px), calc(-50% + ' + (cy * 70).toFixed(1) + 'px))';
        if (Math.abs(tx - cx) > 0.0008 || Math.abs(ty - cy) > 0.0008 || tx !== 0 || ty !== 0) { raf = requestAnimationFrame(loop); }
        else { raf = 0; }
      }
      hero.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
        var r = hero.getBoundingClientRect();
        tx = (e.clientX - r.left) / r.width - 0.5;
        ty = (e.clientY - r.top) / r.height - 0.5;
        if (!raf) raf = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
      });
      hero.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () { tx = 0; ty = 0; if (!raf) raf = requestAnimationFrame(loop); });
    }
  }
})();
</script>
```
